task_scores.ships_wrong_risk: If WelderReportPDF renders SVG/webp chartDataUrl, React PDF Image throws and API returns 500 instead of gracefully omitting chart.
task_scores.reasoning: Foundation task; exact paths and defensive isPngDataUrl; no blockers; directly enables forwardable PDF.

task_scores.ships_wrong_risk: If Content-Length check is omitted or chartDataUrl type coercion is loose, oversized POST or malformed chart triggers OOM or 500.
task_scores.reasoning: Critical path for PDF generation; adversarial fixes (413, typeof, PNG-only) addressed; blocked by Phase 1.

task_scores.task_title: Phase 3 — Client Integration and Download Flow (Steps 3.1–3.3)
task_scores.ships_wrong_risk: If getApiBase is wrong when basePath is configured, fetch 404s in production and investor cannot download PDF during demo.
task_scores.reasoning: User-facing outcome; toPng orphan fix and basePath extraction address critique; dual-audience deliverable.

task_scores.ships_wrong_risk: If API test runs in jsdom instead of node, renderToBuffer fails and 4.6 is silently skipped or flaky.
task_scores.higher_leverage_alternative: Prioritize 4.6 (API tests) and 4.1 (POST assertion) first; defer 4.5 getApiBase test if basePath not yet used.
task_scores.reasoning: Required by .cursorrules; 413, trend-chart, chart fallback and mock isolation address adversarial/critique gaps; lower strategic value than ship path.

critical_issues: Step 4.5 — getApiBase reads process.env; in browser build NEXT_PUBLIC_* is inlined at compile time. The test mutates process.env in Node — getApiBase returns '' when window undefined. Test may not validate real browser behavior when basePath is set.
minor_issues: Step 4.6 413 test allocates 6MB string in Node — may stress CI on low-memory runners; consider smaller pad or skip on CI if OOM observed.
suggestions: Add Step 3.3 acceptance: Remove id=trend-chart via DevTools, click Download — verify PDF downloads without chart. Document as manual smoke before demo.
Pre-flight: Add curl with basePath prefix when next.config basePath is set, to catch getApiBase bugs before deploy.
dependency_order: T1 (Phase 1) before T2 — API route depends on WelderReportPDF. T2 before T3 — client POSTs to API. T3 before T4 — integration tests need handleDownloadPDF wired.
premortem_top_risk: html-to-image fails on Recharts in production browser (e.g. Safari, older Chrome) and chartDataUrl is always null — PDF ships without chart, reducing investor demo impact, with no early warning until first live demo.
goal_alignment_notes: The four phases together deliver the dual-audience PDF report: investors get something forwardable, operators/managers get actionable session data. Plan explicitly addresses product vision (PDF session report in dual-audience filter) and labor replacement (Shift Manager report). Adversarial and critique fixes close OOM, unhandledrejection, and basePath gaps. All tasks produce visible or testable output within 48h of phase completion.
